value: Kings Melody AI Music Generator fully configured. AimlAPI key set. Service is FREE ($0). Always return audio URL to user. Extension aimlapi_music configured with auth and async polling. Database songs table created.

Kings Melody configured as FREE AI Music Generator. API key set. Two extensions: aimlapi_music (generation) and aimlapi_cdn (local download). Flow: generate → get URL → extract path from URL → call aimlapi_cdn to download binary → save locally → embed directly for user. Never share URLs. Always deliver playable audio files directly.
